seo.title: About Wink | Hotel Commerce Company
seo.metaDescription: Learn about Wink, the hotel commerce platform built for hotels, Partners, and platforms that want demand, booking paths, and guest relationships connected.
seo.ogTitle: About Wink | Built by People Who Understand Hotels
seo.ogDescription: Wink connects hotel setup, content, partner demand, booking paths, attribution, and checkout into one hotel commerce layer.

content.h1: Built by people who understand hotels.

fields.heading: Built by people who understand hotels.
fields.body: Learn about Wink, the hotel commerce platform built for hotels, Partners, and platforms that want demand, booking paths, and guest relationships connected.

fields.heading: Choose the next step that fits your role.
fields.body: Learn about Wink, the hotel commerce platform built for hotels, Partners, and platforms that want demand, booking paths, and guest relationships connected.

cards.title: Hotels should see demand clearly.
cards.body: Teams should know where demand comes from and which routes lead to confirmed bookings.

cards.title: Partners should have a fair path.
cards.body: Partners who create booking demand need attribution, booking context, and a trackable way to work with hotels.

cards.title: Booking paths should support the brand.
cards.body: The checkout path should keep the hotel visible instead of hiding the offer behind another channel.

cards.title: Small teams and platforms both matter.
cards.body: Travel commerce should be practical for hotel teams and structured enough for serious platform use cases.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
